/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -L/mnt/WinDisk/Users/liyih/OneDrive/Ph.D/Codes/catkin_overlay_ws/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/WinDisk/Users/liyih/OneDrive/Ph.D/Codes/catkin_overlay_ws/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src:/mnt/WinDisk/Users/liyih/OneDrive/Ph.D/Codes/catkin_overlay_ws/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
